case_title: MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION vs. NORRIS, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $7.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRIS, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 SOUTH PARK #214, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS, MICHAEL
